# 📖 Act Nodes

180 `act` nodes in the spellweb knowledge graph.

## Nodes

- [[⿻ Act I: First Overlap]] — ⿻ as third way between authoritarian AI and libertarian exit.
- [[⿻ Act II: Widening Gulf]] — The Widening Gulf. Technology vs democracy through three bad choices.
- [[⿻ Act III: View from Yushan]] — A View from Yushan. Taiwan transformed collision into elevation.
- [[⿻ Act IV: Digital Democracy]] — The Life of a Digital Democracy. vTaiwan, Pol.is, daily practice.
- [[⿻ Act IX: Foundation Floor]] — The Foundation Beneath the Floor. Rights as OS layer.
- [[⿻ Act V: Glyph That Breathes]] — Plurality at quantum to cosmic scales. Recognition of how reality is structured.
- [[⿻ Act VI: Web Beneath Web]] — The Web Beneath the Web. Complexity science, emergence, conditions for ⿻.
- [[⿻ Act VII: Teachers Before Drake]] — The Teachers Before the Drake. Simmel, Dewey, Ostrom, Arendt, Allen.
- [[⿻ Act VIII: Path Abandoned]] — The Path Abandoned. Licklider, Engelbart, Nelson—the Lost Dao.
- [[⿻ Act X: Name Yourself]] — The Name You Give Yourself. Self-sovereign identity, selective disclosure.
- [[⿻ Act XI: Self-Forming Guilds]] — The Guilds That Form Themselves. Association rights, federated networks.
- [[⿻ Act XII: Market Doesn't Devour]] — The Market That Doesn't Devour. Privacy-preserving commerce, 7th capital.
- [[⿻ Act XIII: Held Together]] — What Can Be Held Together. Digital property, commons, plural ownership.
- [[⿻ Act XIV: Door Both Ways]] — The Door That Opens Both Ways. Universal access.
- [[⿻ Act XIX: Rules That Learn]] — Rules That Learn. Adaptive governance with guardrails.
- [[⿻ Act XV: Words Before Words]] — Words Before Words. Post-symbolic communication.
- [[⿻ Act XVI: World We Build]] — The World We Build Together. Immersive shared reality.
- [[⿻ Act XVII: Creation Compounds]] — The Creation That Compounds. AI collaboration with fair credit.
- [[⿻ Act XVIII: Hearing at Scale]] — The Hearing at Scale. Augmented deliberation, Pol.is.
- [[⿻ Act XX: Weight of Wanting]] — The Weight of Wanting. Quadratic voting and funding.
- [[⿻ Act XXI: Market Remembers]] — The Market That Remembers. Social markets with reputation.
- [[⿻ Act XXII: Circle Includes]] — The Circle That Includes. Plural publics in relationship.
- [[⿻ Act XXIII: Forge of Peers]] — The Forge of Peers. Worker ownership, augmentation over replacement.
- [[⿻ Act XXIV: Body's Secrets]] — The Body's Secrets. Patient-owned health data, federated learning.
- [[⿻ Act XXIX: Window Closes]] — The Window That Closes. 2-3 year critical window before surveillance calcifies.
- [[⿻ Act XXV: Signal and Noise]] — The Signal and the Noise. Rebuilding media for shared reality.
- [[⿻ Act XXVI: Commons Breathes]] — The Commons That Breathes. Environment as ultimate coordination challenge.
- [[⿻ Act XXVII: Mind That Grows]] — The Mind That Grows. Education for plural citizenship.
- [[⿻ Act XXVIII: Laws Enable]] — The Laws That Enable. Policy as gardening for society.
- [[⿻ Act XXX: Ceremony Complete]] — The ceremony completes. Protection enables exit enables coordination.
